name: Download .torrent file

falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: Downloads dir contains a 0-byte file; assertion 'torrentFile.length() > 100' fires; or the 'd' bencoded marker assertion fails.

operator_run_instructions: Capture screenshot of TopicDetail download success indicator + adb pulled torrent file. Hash it (sha256) and embed in evidence file.
Perform falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture verbatim failure assertion, revert.
